examples: She steadfastly maintained that her grandsons were innocent, and nothing could dissuade her from that belief.
But he steadfastly denied any intentional wrongdoing.
This newspaper has argued steadfastly for the right of Israel to exist.
On the other hand, it has steadfastly insisted that it is not a store.
Mr. Clinton -- who has not been charged -- has steadfastly denied the accusation.
